keys.description: Compiled SettingsRegistry — the #[AsSetting] catalogue. Loaded at boot.
Resolved value cascade for one (scope, group). Hot path — every GET reads this.
invalidatedBy: SettingsChangeEvent for the (scope, group) tuple OR any ancestor scope's tuple

keys.description: Full schema JSON for `GET /api/v1/settings/schema`. Same content for every tenant.
AsSetting.permission per group. Cached separately for fast permission gating without loading the full registry.
